'''âdh-ch-l-ch''' ('''kadhachlechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backpatch|backpatch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ch-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backpatch|backpatch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-ch-l-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kadhachlechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhachlechoko|thidhachlechoko]] || [[word:jidhachlechoko|jidhachlechoko]] || [[word:shidhachlechoko|shidhachlechoko]] || [[word:kidhachlechoko|kidhachlechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhachlechoko|thuthudhachlechoko]] || [[word:jujudhachlechoko|jujudhachlechoko]] || [[word:shushudhachlechoko|shushudhachlechoko]] || [[word:kukudhachlechoko|kukudhachlechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhachlechoko|thodhachlechoko]] || [[word:jodhachlechoko|jodhachlechoko]] || [[word:shodhachlechoko|shodhachlechoko]] || [[word:kodhachlechoko|kodhachlechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhachlechoko|thodhachlechoko]] || [[word:jodhachlechoko|jodhachlechoko]] || [[word:shodhachlechoko|shodhachlechoko]] || [[word:kodhachlechoko|kodhachlechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhachlechoko|thĂŠdhachlechoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdhachlechoko|jĂŠdhachlechoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdhachlechoko|shĂŠdhachlechoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdhachlechoko|kĂŠdhachlechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhachlechoko|thathadhachlechoko]] || [[word:jajadhachlechoko|jajadhachlechoko]] || [[word:shashadhachlechoko|shashadhachlechoko]] || [[word:kakadhachlechoko|kakadhachlechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhachlechoko|thadhachlechoko]] || [[word:jadhachlechoko|jadhachlechoko]] || [[word:shadhachlechoko|shadhachlechoko]] || [[word:kadhachlechoko|kadhachlechoko]]
|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
